Name: Orator Static Server
Tagline: Static file serving for Orator with MIME type detection, default file resolution, and subdomain routing
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-orator-static-server-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#3ec4ea"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-orator-static-server-filled-light)"><rect x="20" y="20" width="56" height="56" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
					<path d="M 48 30 L 70 48 L 48 66 L 26 48 Z" fill="#db4493"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">OSS</text>
	</svg>
